name: With That Face, You Like Who?
overview: No-eul, a man who knows when to step forward and when to step back and can distinguish between what he can pursue and what he cannot, finds himself receiving an unwarranted amount of attention from two beautiful women.

trailers.title: 노을이의 마음은 어디를 향하게 될까? #그얼굴로누굴좋아한다구요 Preview
